---
layout: none
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

This is a {{ site.website }} website built with Jekyll. Each page below is available in LLM-readable markdown by appending index.html.md to the URL.
{% if site.publications.size > 0 and site.website == "publications" %}

## Publications
{% for pub in site.publications -%}
- [{{ pub.title }}]({{ site.data.config[site.website].url }}{{ pub.url }}index.html.md){% if pub.cite %}: {{ pub.cite }}{% endif %}
{% endfor -%}
{% endif -%}

{% if site.courses.size > 0 and site.website == "courses" %}

## Courses
{% for course in site.courses -%}
- [{{ course.title }}]({{ site.data.config[site.website].url }}{{ course.url }}index.html.md){% if course.description %}: {{ course.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor -%}
{% endif -%}

{% if site.posts.size > 0 and site.website == "blog" %}

## Blog Posts
{% for post in site.posts -%}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.data.config[site.website].url }}{{ post.url }}index.html.md){% if post.description %}: {{ post.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor -%}
{% endif -%}

{% if site.datasets.size > 0 %}

## Datasets
{% for dataset in site.datasets -%}
- [{{ dataset.title }}]({{ site.data.config[site.website].url }}{{ dataset.url }}index.html.md){% if dataset.description %}: {{ dataset.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor -%}
{% endif -%}

{% if site.events.size > 0 %}

## Events
{% for event in site.events -%}
- [{{ event.title }}]({{ site.data.config[site.website].url }}{{ event.url }}index.html.md){% if event.description %}: {{ event.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor -%}
{% endif -%}
